description: Direct computation: at k=4, the {1,4} density is 1.0735% while the {2,4} density (from the updated summary) is ~0.00431%. The amplification is 1.0735 / 0.00431 ≈ 249. So, the maximal observed amplification in the range k=4,..,10 is about 249x, supporting the updated claim in the summary.
action_taken: Direct computation: at k=4, the {1,4} density is 1.0735% while the {2,4} density (from the updated summary) is ~0.00431%. The amplification is 1.0735 / 0.00431 ≈ 249. So, the maximal observed amplification in the range k=4,..,10 is about 249x, supporting the updated claim in the summary.
